anti_claims: This organ JSON seed does not flip source authority away from core/organ_atlas.json and core/organ_registry.json.
Required paper/mechanism/code links prove declared structural references only, not runtime correctness or release readiness.
Selective concept, principle, axiom, and sibling-organ edges are not inferred from prose, specialty, family, or evidence class.
Absent selective organ edges are residual pressure, not evidence that no neighbours exist.
Generated markdown, graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omission_receipt.reason: Organ instance preserves public-safe atlas/registry fields. Required links resolve only when source ids or paths resolve; selective law/concept/principle edges remain residual unless source evidence names ids.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Populate missing paper/mechanism/code links from source evidence, then bind concept/principle/axiom/wires_to edges only when ids are named.

organ_payload.claim_ceiling: Bounded public runtime validation over copied non-secret macro pattern bodies, sanitized dogfood trace slices, recomputed monitor-verdict spans, source-artifact evidence refs, digest/body-free/private-state gates, and negative cases only; no live agent execution, monitor product performance, control-eval score, safety-validation, benchmark, provider-call, source-mutation, release, publication, or product authority.

source_atlas_row.agent_gloss: An agent runs this to validate a public monitor-redteam bundle: the runner verifies copied macro-pattern bodies and a sanitized dogfood trace slice by digest, recomputes monitor verdict spans from public evidence refs, rejects verdict/source-evidence/body-in-receipt/digest tampering, and keeps all receipts body-free while refusing live-agent, credential, exploit, private-reasoning, traffic, and performance-claim inputs.
source_atlas_row.claim_ceiling_restated: Bounded public runtime validation over copied non-secret macro pattern bodies, sanitized dogfood trace slices, recomputed monitor-verdict spans, source-artifact evidence refs, digest/body-free/private-state gates, and negative cases only; no live agent execution, monitor product performance, control-eval score, safety-validation, benchmark, provider-call, source-mutation, release, publication, or product authority.

code_loci.role: Runtime authority for monitor/redteam fixture validation, exported bundle source-module checks, public trace validation, negative-case enforcement, and body-free receipt writing.

source_atlas_row.human_gloss: It replays three made-up agent trajectories (a normal one, one trying to hide a failure, and one overstepping a tool's permissions) and checks that every monitor verdict — including a clean "pass" — comes with the receipts needed to re-run and verify it. The receipts show exactly which checks each verdict depends on, and any verdict missing its backing evidence gets quarantined instead of trusted. It is a demo over fictional data, not a measurement of how well a real monitor catches anything.

source_atlas_row.wiring_note: binds only to the shared kernel plus evidence/authority spine (private_state_scan, source-module digest checks, public trace recomputation, receipts, authority_ceiling); it remains a drilldown, not product-path live monitor authority. Doctrine-lattice wires_to additions in this row are source-derived from core/mechanism_sources.json upstream_of rows for the organ's hosted mechanism(s); they name structural sibling navigation only, not live invocation, release authority, or proof of runtime integration.
